base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of world_1_yoshis_island — a tile (level_layout) from 1990 super mario world. Yoshi's Island — 5 stages (Yoshi's House + YI-1 + YI-2 + YI-3 + YI-4 + Yellow Switch Palace). Starter world tutorial. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Yoshi's Island — 5 stages (Yoshi's House + YI-1 + YI-2 + YI-3 + YI-4 + Yellow Switch Palace). Starter world tutorial
